name: ochd
description: 8 free-running analog triangle LFOs in 4HP. Single global rate knob with CV and attenuverter. LFOs arranged fastest-to-slowest top-to-bottom. Negative CV stalls all LFOs (track & hold).

controls.name: Rate
controls.description: Sets frequency of all 8 LFOs simultaneously. CW = faster.
controls.detail: LFO1 max: 160Hz · LFO8 min: 25min cycle · center: LFO1 at 3–7Hz

controls.name: Rate Attenuverter
controls.description: Scales and/or inverts the Rate CV input signal.
controls.detail: CCW: invert · noon: zero · CW: unity

inputs.name: Rate CV
inputs.description: Bipolar CV for global rate control. Positive extends range; negative stalls LFOs.

outputs.name: LFO 1–8
outputs.description: Eight bipolar triangle LFO outputs, fastest (top) to slowest (bottom).

behaviors.name: Organic Phase Drift
behaviors.description: All 8 cores run independently and phase organically over time, producing natural evolving modulation.

behaviors.name: LFO Stall / Track & Hold
behaviors.description: Applying negative CV stalls all LFOs at their current voltage, acting as a track-and-hold. Gate → Rate CV with attenuverter fully CCW achieves this.

behaviors.name: Feedback Waveshaping
behaviors.description: Patching any LFO output back to Rate CV input creates waveshaped, non-linear LFO shapes on all channels.

behaviors.name: Self-modulation
behaviors.description: Patching any output to Rate CV creates waveform folding: exponential curves, pseudo-squares, stepped shapes, or chaotic oscillation depending on attenuverter.

behaviors.name: Track-and-hold freeze
behaviors.description: Gate with attenuverter fully CCW stalls all 8 LFOs at current voltage. Simultaneous track-and-hold on all outputs.

patchIdeas.name: Feedback waveshaping
patchIdeas.patch: Any output → Rate CV · attenuverter sets depth · creates exponential curves and pseudo-square waves from triangles
patchIdeas.diagram:
OCHD:
* Rate Attenuverter: sets feedback depth
- OCHD (LFO 4) >> OCHD (Rate CV) // self-patch warps all 8 shapes
- OCHD (LFO 1) >> VCO (FM)
- OCHD (LFO 8) >> FILTER (Cutoff)

patchIdeas.name: 8-parameter granular drifter
patchIdeas.patch: 8 outputs → 8 CV inputs on granular module · each parameter evolves at independent rate · never repeats
patchIdeas.diagram:
OCHD:
* Rate: noon
- OCHD (LFO 1) >> GRANULAR (START)
- OCHD (LFO 2) >> GRANULAR (WRAP)
- OCHD (LFO 3) >> GRANULAR (SIZE)
- OCHD (LFO 4) >> GRANULAR (PITCH)
- OCHD (LFO 5) >> GRANULAR (TONE)
- OCHD (LFO 6) >> GRANULAR (BLUR)
- OCHD (LFO 7) >> GRANULAR (SHAPE)
- OCHD (LFO 8) >> GRANULAR (SCAN) // 8 independently drifting params

patchIdeas.name: Audio-rate FM
patchIdeas.patch: LFO 1 at max Rate (160Hz+) → VCO FM input · organic triangle-wave FM with free-running drift
patchIdeas.diagram:
OCHD:
* Rate: fully CW (LFO 1 at 160Hz+)
- OCHD (LFO 1) -> VCO (FM In)
- VCO (Out) -> MIXER (In) // triangle FM with free-running drift

patchIdeas.name: Rhythmic CV freeze
patchIdeas.patch: Clock gate → Rate CV · attenuverter fully CCW · all LFOs freeze on gate high · resume on low
patchIdeas.diagram:
OCHD:
* Rate Attenuverter: fully CCW (invert)
- CLOCK (Out) g> OCHD (Rate CV) // negative CV stalls all 8 LFOs
- OCHD (LFO 1) >> VCA (CV)
- OCHD (LFO 5) >> FILTER (Cutoff)
